vulnerability.reference: Training on unfiltered web data leads to memorization of private and copyrighted visual content.
vulnerability.generated: Users lack tools to verify image provenance, and assistants offer no filtering of memorized private content, preventing users from avoiding exposure.

impact.reference: Unauthorized disclosure of personal photos violates privacy and triggers legal liability under data protection laws.
impact.generated: Private and copyrighted images are disclosed to querying users, causing privacy violations, legal liability, and loss of trust in retrieval services.

dose_response.reference: Multimodal LLMs memorizing training images enables recall of private visuals; when users query image assistants, they inadvertently trigger unauthorized disclosure, violating privacy and incurring legal liability.
dose_response.generated: Multimodal LLMs that memorize and recall training images, when users query image-based assistants, trigger the lack of provenance verification and content filtering, leading to disclosure of private and copyrighted images, causing privacy violations, legal liability, and trust loss.
